query:
-- Delete old wrong-slug rows that have duplicates with correct slugs
-- Keep the row with the correct slug (le_moyne, central_connecticut, west_georgia, michigan_state)
-- Delete the wrong-slug versions (lemoyne, c_conn_st, w_georgia, michigan_st)

-- First show what we're deleting
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, sortOrder, fileId FROM games 
WHERE (homeTeam IN ('lemoyne', 'c_conn_st', 'w_georgia', 'michigan_st') 
    OR awayTeam IN ('lemoyne', 'c_conn_st', 'w_georgia', 'michigan_st'))
ORDER BY gameDate, awayTeam;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
-- Delete old wrong-slug rows that have duplicates with correct slugs
-- Keep the row with the correct slug (le_moyne, central_connecticut, west_georgia, michigan_state)
-- Delete the wrong-slug versions (lemoyne, c_conn_st, w_georgia, michigan_st)

-- First show what we're deleting
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, sortOrder, fileId FROM games 
WHERE (homeTeam IN ('lemoyne', 'c_conn_st', 'w_georgia', 'michigan_st') 
    OR awayTeam IN ('lemoyne', 'c_conn_st', 'w_georgia', 'michigan_st'))
ORDER BY gameDate, awayTeam;
